AU_MAPPINGTRANSFORMATION.au_mapXmlFile:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><maps version="4.4"> <mappingInformation> <mappingVersion>6.1</mappingVersion> <mappingName>DM_Postgres_TGT</mappingName> <mappingProject>Default</mappingProject> <mappingDescription>DM_Postgres_TGT</mappingDescription> <sourceSchemaID>TextSchema:1419601977380171776</sourceSchemaID> <targetSchemaID>AdvanceDbSchema:1419912245675028480</targetSchemaID> <mappingOwnerGroup>administrators</mappingOwnerGroup> <mappingOwner>Admin User</mappingOwner> <mappingLastModifiedBy>Admin User</mappingLastModifiedBy> <mappingCreationDate>Tue Sep 23 10:35:27 IST 2025</mappingCreationDate> <mappingModifiedDate>Tue Sep 23 10:35:34 IST 2025</mappingModifiedDate> <reusable>null</reusable> </mappingInformation> <sourceRoots> <sourceRoot> <name>Root</name> <schemaName>Test_layout_post</schemaName> <schemaID>TextSchema:1419601977380171776</schemaID> </sourceRoot> </sourceRoots> <targetRoots> <targetRoot> <name>DB</name> <schemaName>Postgres_DB_lyt</schemaName> <schemaID>AdvanceDbSchema:1419912245675028480</schemaID> <stream>output_1</stream> </targetRoot> </targetRoots> <nameSpace/> <xslProperty/> <GlobalPreCustomXSL/> <GlobalPostCustomXSL/> <xslTemplates/> <map> <order>1</order> <targetName>Postgres_DB_lyt</targetName> <dest>/DB/employee</dest> <preCustomXSL/> <postCustomXSL/> <mapValue>$Input_Test_layout_post/Root/Record</mapValue> <forEach/> <comments/> <namespacePrefix/>

<globalParameters> <keys> </keys> <contextVariables> </contextVariables> </globalParameters>
<connections/> <functions> </functions> <disableOutputNodes> </disableOutputNodes> <filters/> <valuemapNodes/> <accessLevel> <valueMap>global</valueMap> <globalTemplate>global</globalTemplate> <customAutoMap>global</customAutoMap> </accessLevel> <DataViewerRecordCount>50</DataViewerRecordCount> <isQuickSplittingEnabled>false</isQuickSplittingEnabled> <sourceExtensions/> <targetExtensions/> <disableOutputNodes/> <characterSetEncoding>UTF-8</characterSetEncoding> <tipOfTheDay>true</tipOfTheDay> <contextSchemaLoadedAtSource>false</contextSchemaLoadedAtSource> <contextSchemaLoadedAtTarget>false</contextSchemaLoadedAtTarget> <contextSchemaDefinition/> <filterUnmappedElement>false</filterUnmappedElement> <indentOutputXML>true</indentOutputXML> <streamingMode>false</streamingMode> <filterEmptyElements>false</filterEmptyElements> <dbQueryCaching>false</dbQueryCaching> <cacheIncludedSchemas>false</cacheIncludedSchemas> <TreeExpandLevelCount>3</TreeExpandLevelCount> <TreeExpandLevelCountForWebService>5</TreeExpandLevelCountForWebService> <TreeExpandLevelForEasySchemaExtensions>10</TreeExpandLevelForEasySchemaExtensions> <SelfRecursionLevel>0</SelfRecursionLevel> <EnableTypesBuffering>true</EnableTypesBuffering> <CdataSectionElements/> <excludeResultPrefixes> saxonJavaMappingTransformation saxonJavaMapperQueryExecutor saxonJavaAggregateFunctionHandler str</excludeResultPrefixes> <webservice> <consumers/> </webservice>
<CustomAutoMapInUse/> <processElementFormDefault>true</processElementFormDefault> <xslVersion2.0>false</xslVersion2.0> <xslVersion3.0>false</xslVersion3.0> <sourceXpath/> <targetXpath/> </maps>
AU_MAPPINGTRANSFORMATION.au_xslFile: <?xml version='1.0'?> <xsl:stylesheet xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" version="1.1" xmlns:saxonJavaMappingTransformation="java:com.adeptia.indigo.services.mapping.MappingTransformation" xmlns:saxonJavaMapperQueryExecutor="java:com.adeptia.indigo.services.mapping.support.dbquery.MapperQueryExecutor" xmlns:saxonJavaAggregateFunctionHandler="java:com.adeptia.indigo.services.mapping.AggregateFunctionHandler" xmlns:str="http://exslt.org/strings" exclude-result-prefixes="saxonJavaMappingTransformation saxonJavaMapperQueryExecutor saxonJavaAggregateFunctionHandler str" xmlns:saxon="http://saxon.sf.net/" extension-element-prefixes="saxon"> <xsl:output method="xml" version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" cdata-section-elements="" indent="yes" /><xsl:param name="_userName"/><xsl:param name="_password"/><xsl:param name="_class"/><xsl:param name="_identifier"/><xsl:param name="_subject"/><xsl:param name="_repositoryPath"/><xsl:param name="_Input1"/> <xsl:variable name="varConn" select="saxonJavaMapperQueryExecutor:getInstance($_identifier,'false')"/> <xsl:variable name="apos">'</xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="quot">"</xsl:variable><xsl:template match="/"><DB><xsl:apply-templates select="Root/Record" mode="_DB_employee_order1"> </xsl:apply-templates></DB></xsl:template><xsl:template match="/Root/Record" mode="_DB_employee_order1"> <employee><xsl:attribute name="Action"></xsl:attribute><xsl:attribute name="RollBackOnError"></xsl:attribute><xsl:attribute name="recordNumber"></xsl:attribute><emp_id><xsl:attribute name="isNull"></xsl:attribute><xsl:value-of select="EMP_ID"/></emp_id><first_name><xsl:attribute name="isNull"></xsl:attribute><xsl:value-of select="FIRST_NAME"/></first_name><last_name><xsl:attribute name="isNull"></xsl:attribute><xsl:value-of select="LAST_NAME"/></last_name><email><xsl:attribute name="isNull"></xsl:attribute><xsl:value-of select="EMAIL"/></email><phone_number><xsl:attribute name="isNull"></xsl:attribute><xsl:value-of select="PHONE_NUMBER"/></phone_number><hire_date><xsl:attribute name="isNull"></xsl:attribute><xsl:value-of select="HIRE_DATE"/></hire_date><job_title><xsl:attribute name="isNull"></xsl:attribute><xsl:value-of select="JOB_TITLE"/></job_title><salary><xsl:attribute name="isNull"></xsl:attribute><xsl:value-of select="SALARY"/></salary><department><xsl:attribute name="isNull"></xsl:attribute><xsl:value-of select="DEPARTMENT"/></department></employee></xsl:template></xsl:stylesheet>
